reviews.name: places/ChIJEx46WRhdfYcRyyQ3IVSK8bo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21jM2VuWTBhRWd4WW5CelJHVk9ZMk5XTm1oc1VVRRAB
reviews.text:
I had an outstanding experience with Game Day. The entire team was professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely focused on my health and overall well-being. During the consultation they took the time to listen, answer all of my questions, and thoroughly explain my options. What really stood out to me was their transparency. Joel was very clear about treatment plans, pricing, and what to realistically expect. The biggest thing, no pressure  just honesty and professionalism. It was a refreshing experience to talk to someone who clearly prioritizes patient care and education.
I could tell they truly care about long-term health, not just quick fixes. I felt comfortable, informed, and confident in whatever decision I chose to make. I have friends in other parts of the US that use Game Day and  I highly recommend Game Day Rapid City to anyone looking for a trustworthy and professional TRT clinic.

reviews.name: places/ChIJEx46WRhdfYcRyyQ3IVSK8bo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5MFduZHNla3g1VkV0VlFXTXhObFZyZEhWdlJXYxAB
reviews.text: After an ankle injury, peptides were recommended to me. I’ve heard a lot of conflicting information- But my doctor told me Gameday was a local reputable source with pharmaceutical Grade product I could trust. Only a week and a half into using peptides, I cannot believe how much my pain level has been reduced. Of course I’m going to be careful and continue resting as my doctor recommends but It’s amazing what our bodies can do with the help of natural supplements. I’m so glad Rapid City has this resource locally and I highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJEx46WRhdfYcRyyQ3IVSK8bo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twVVpuVXdTM0ZxV0hkME0xRkRRV2REVVhORlRYYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about GameDay Men’s Health in Rapid City. I’ve struggled for a long time trying to find a place that not only understands my needs, but actually relates to them. From the very first visit, it was clear this wasn’t just another clinic treating you like a number…  they treat you like a friend or family member stopping in.

The staff is incredible. Knowledgeable, welcoming, and genuinely invested in helping you feel your best. From the moment I stepped foot in the building, I felt valued and respected. Everything was explained clearly, no pressure, no rushed conversations, just honest, professional care.

The facility itself is spotless and extremely well kept. You can tell cleanliness and attention to detail are a priority, which immediately puts you at ease. It was also incredibly easy to stop in, get taken care of, and feel comfortable the entire time.

If you’re on the fence or have had trouble finding a  health clinic that truly gets it, this is the place. GameDay Men’s Health sets the bar,  and then raises it.
Highly recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlXuuii5DfYcRQ-kyedMQFxU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WbWVGRjRVazFVTlRKVlYyVTRWWEphVUZaVmEwRRAB
reviews.text: Started seeing Cathy in Feb of 2025, I was feeling horrible and my regular provider wasn’t able to help me. Cathy did extensive blood work and figured out my hormones were off and that I did in fact have an auto immune disorder. She has successfully increased hormone levels and has me on a strict diet that has resulted in a 20lb weight loss. My stomach does not hurt anymore, my sleep has improved, I have more energy and less brain fog. I highly recommend seeing Cathy for an evaluation. Cathy is very helpful and listens to what you’re going through.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlXuuii5DfYcRQ-kyedMQFxU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKVWJETk9iVFJDTFZSRVNXeDRjbE5aVTE5Q1IzYxAB
reviews.text: It was refreshing to speak with a health care provider who looks beyond the standard lab work to see what else may be going on. Cathy took the time to address each of my main concerns and to develop an action plan. She is extremely knowledgeable and practical, and I felt no pressure to follow any particular protocol. I left the office feeling informed and listened to.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlXuuii5DfYcRQ-kyedMQFxU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6LU1TRWd3RRAB
reviews.text: Melissa and everyone at Well Beyond are simply amazing. They’re professional, they know their stuff, and they treat you like a patient, not a number. Melissa is never rushed during our appointments or distracted, but rather, she’s concentrated and gives you her full attention. She really cares about helping you heal and get healthy. I've been going to traditional doctors for years in some of the best medical practices in the country, and they couldn’t figure out any of my health issues, and on top of it, they misdiagnosed me. Not Melissa and her team, they got to the root and helped me with my countless health issues and I’m so thankful!

reviews.name: places/ChIJlXuuii5DfYcRQ-kyedMQFxU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Wd1UzSkxTbVpSZFVnNFdHSjVSWEY0Wkc4NVlWRRAB
reviews.text: Having hot flashes 10-15 times a day, severe joint pain, feeling lazy because I had no energy and couldn’t lose a lb no matter what I did. This was all before coming to Well Beyond and I admittedly didn’t have much hope that much would improve. In just a couple of weeks my hot flashes were gone, I was sleeping again and had energy. About two months in my joint pain fully subsided and I now (1 year later) feel like I did in my 30’s. I even lost the 15 extra pounds I gained. Greatly exceeded my expectations! Thank you Melissa, Cathy and Well Beyond!

reviews.name: places/ChIJlXuuii5DfYcRQ-kyedMQFxU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5ODdXQ2l3RRAB
reviews.text: Cathy Wilson has really helped me reach a better quality of health. Her in depth review of my lipid panels helped me to identify some potential health issues and cardiac markers. Her ability to review panel’s brought to light an issue with LP(a) and she prescribed medication to aid in getting levels under control. Her care has made my health and daily well being much better! Would recommend 100%

reviews.text: I met Dr. Jen a year ago at the recommendation of my oncology PA.  One of the best recommendations of my life.  My body and hormones were a mess after ovarian cancer treatments.  I didn't recognize myself, nor did I feel like myself.  Dr. Jen was and is one of the most understanding and compassionate professionals I have met.  She listened, understood my situation and was honest but caring in her approach.  She is extremely thorough and meticulous in her approach and available to communicate when I had questions.  From where I started a year ago to where I am now- I never thought I would feel like myself again- but, here I am- recognizing myself!  I am forever grateful!

reviews.name: places/ChIJM5s9eSq3jocRnWDH7azwUHM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twRFIzSkNiaTFDVFhwNVFUZDNXR2sxU1RoblYwRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Redmond has changed my life! After working with her for only a few months I’ve lost the weight I’ve been trying to lose for several years, finally feel good throughout the day and not bloated and sluggish, and was able to conceive naturally after 3 years of trying! Dr. Redmond has been the best Dr. and unlike any other doctor or specialist I’ve seen. She truly cares about you and wants to help you achieve your goals. I recommend her to anyone I know struggling to get pregnant, struggling with hormonal changes, or struggling with menopause symptoms. Working with Dr. Redmond is worth every single dollar you will spend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJM5s9eSq3jocRnWDH7azwUHM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0clMzcHJWVWh6VTJKQ1NWbE9SVGd3YTNWeGVYYxAB

reviews.text: I checked out Limitless Male for the weight loss program and in about 2 months I’ve lost quite a bit of weight just from the knowledge and support of really all the staff. From Sean helping go over the program, Dr Stacey and Matt providing check ins, and shout out to Juels and Babany for being my support squad in making me feel well accomplished in my weight loss journey. They are genuinely just as, if not even more excited than me for my progress as I continue to work towards my goal weight. It’s been truly a 5 star experience for me. Thank to all the Limitless Male - Sioux Falls staff. You guys have been phenomenal.

reviews.name: places/ChIJey1iDLjJjocRid9fxuFz194/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGWFVVZ3pNelZLVTFkVlVXeG9PSE5OYXpOc01VRRAB
reviews.text: Life changing is all I can say.   Came in to get my blood checked because they were running a special for men's mental health month.  I'm 46 and had a testosterone level 224.   I weighed a 160 on a good day.  Had zero motivation to do anything.  after a few months I feel better than I have in years and put on 10 pounds of lean mass.  I had no idea this was even a thing.    It's a commitment financially and getting an injection once a week is not that fun but a small price to pay for quality of life.   The staff is amazing.    They are so easy to work with and great you by name.    It feels like there number 1 priority is making you feel good again.   They have multiple products they talk to you about but they don't try to sell you them just because.   They honestly never even talked to me about most of there supplements because they actually listen when you tell them how you feel and recommend accordingly with zero pressure to buy.

reviews.name: places/ChIJey1iDLjJjocRid9fxuFz194/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21GMFUwOVNXbVk1Wm5KNWMyOUtibVJpYjNjMlZHYxAB
reviews.text: The staff at Limitless has been great to work with and I’ve had fantastic improvements in my overall wellbeing since I’ve started TRT.

reviews.name: places/ChIJey1iDLjJjocRid9fxuFz194/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xab1Z6aFlOa2QwZUZkaU5tOVNYMUJ4WlVOcloxRRAB
reviews.text: Great experience overall. The team was down-to-earth, easy to talk to, and made the whole process feel low-pressure. They gave me solid info, answered all my questions, and didn’t try to upsell or push anything I wasn’t ready for. Felt like they really had my best interest in mind.

reviews.name: places/ChIJey1iDLjJjocRid9fxuFz194/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoNFVIWkhUbU55ZUVzMVdXRTRaR1oyTFVwRlpHYxAB
reviews.text: I originally had a good experience with Limitless Male when I started early July. On July 30th, I reached out to them letting them know I was going to start going to my primary care provider for Trt and would no longer need to keep my appointments with them. I never heard anything back and was then charged for the month of August. I disputed that charge with my credit card company. My credit card company has yet to hear from them. September rolls around and I was charged again. Which again, I disputed with my credit card company. I have been forced to get a new credit card with a new number so I will no longer be charged.

reviews.text: Coming into Trillion to get information on improving my health. They were very friendly and very helpful with a lot of information. They broke it all down for me and answered all my questions. They made it so I understood everything before leaving to go home. That made it helpful to talk to my husband to make a plan moving forward.  When I came back for my results they explained all the options and were not pushing and medication just answer.  I will definitely be continuing to come back and would recommend to anyone with concerns of their health.
